content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 20, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 20, 2026, focused on optimizing cloud infrastructure for managed agents. The primary achievement was the implementation of a local in-container database solution to resolve connection pooling issues and improve agent scalability.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Cloud Infrastructure Optimization
*   Implemented a root-cause fix for the "too many clients" incident by transitioning managed agents to use a local in-container PGlite database instead of pooling against a shared cloud Postgres instance ([#8754](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8754)).
*   Integrated lean chat plugins to support the new managed agent architecture ([#8754](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8754)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   None

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None

## NEW ISSUES
*   None

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None
